# Copilot Instructions

Always abide by the constitution documents in [`docs/constitutions/`](../docs/constitutions/).

Before suggesting or generating changes:

- Read the applicable constitution document first.
- Follow the most specific applicable constitution.
- Treat constitution guidance as authoritative over older patterns or stale documentation.
- Do not cross product ownership boundaries unless the constitution explicitly permits it.
- Do not duplicate canonical data from another product unless the constitution explicitly permits a labeled snapshot.
- If a requested change conflicts with a constitution, call out the conflict instead of guessing.

Primary references:

- [`docs/constitutions/ownership.md`](../docs/constitutions/ownership.md)
- [`docs/constitutions/ui.md`](../docs/constitutions/ui.md)
- [`docs/constitutions/pages/`](../docs/constitutions/pages/)
